result:
All clean. All bugs are fixed. Here's a summary of the 35 bugs found and fixed:

**Type/arity errors (caught by mypy):**
1. `procurement.py:113` — `purchaseorder_supplier_id(line)` → `poline_product_id(line)`
2. `procurement.py:411` — `inv.reorder_needed()` → `inv.reorder_needed(levels)`
3. `orders.py:148` — `cust.tier_discount_pct(c.id)` → `cust.tier_discount_pct(c.tier)`
4. `employees.py:151` — `order_commission(rules, str(employee_id), ...)` → `order_commission(rules, employee_id, ...)`
5. `promotions.py:212` — `tier_qualifies(customer.id, ...)` → `tier_qualifies(customer.tier, ...)`
6. `billing.py:137` — `ord.order_customer_id()` → `ord.order_customer_id(order)`
7. `billing.py:172` — swapped status/issued_at args in Invoice constructor
8. `billing.py:559` — typed initial value for reduce to fix return type
9. `shipping.py:275` — `shipments_for_order(shipments, "pending")` → `shipments_for_order(shipments, order_id)`
10. `notifications.py:119` — missing `sent_at` arg (added `0`)
11. `analytics.py:153` — `ord.orders_in_period(p[0], p[1])` → `ord.orders_in_period(orders, p[0], p[1])`
12. `audit.py:130` — `ship.shipment_status(shipment)` → `ship.shipment_id(shipment)` for entity_id
13. `audit.py:353` — `ord.find_order_by_id(invoice_order_id)` → `ord.find_order_by_id(orders, invoice_order_id)`
14. `audit.py:392` — added None guard before `emp.employee_name(employee)`

**Logic errors (found by reading code):**
15. `catalog.py:104` — margin was `cost - price`, fixed to `price - cost`
16. `catalog.py:144` — filtered on `product_id` instead of `product_category_id`
17. `customers.py:69-77` — tier discounts inverted (gold=5/bronze=15 → gold=15/bronze=5)
18. `inventory.py:194` — reorder_needed used `>` instead of `<`
19. `orders.py:135` — spurious `2 *` multiplier in tax calculation
20. `orders.py:143` — `calculate_total` added discount instead of subtracting
21. `shipping.py:130` — `carrier_id(c)` → `carrier_base_rate(c)` in cost calculation
22. `shipping.py:149` — zone surcharge added pct directly instead of computing `(cost * pct) // 100`
23. `promotions.py:176` — percentage discount divided by 10 instead of 100
24. `promotions.py:118` — `campaign.id` → `campaign.start_date` in active check
25. `employees.py:97` — `find_employee_by_id` matched on `hire_date` instead of `id`
26. `billing.py:148` — `invoices_for_customer` filtered on `order_id` instead of `customer_id`
27. `billing.py:517` — `days_past_due` computed `due_at - now` instead of `now - due_at`
28. `notifications.py:141` — `find_notification_by_id` matched on `template_id` instead of `id`
29. `audit.py:126` — `audit_order` used `order_customer_id` instead of `order_id` for entity_id
30. `analytics.py:419` — bucket total summed `order_id` instead of `order_total`
31. `reports.py:321` — `period_comparison` used `p2_orders` for both p1 and p2 revenue
